name: aws-iam-credential-report
description: AWS IAM credential report — per-user MFA + key-rotation + password-age posture.
title: aws-iam-credential-report

llmHints.on_match: IAM credential report fetched. Per-user MFA/key-age/password-age posture captured.

positiveSetup: Invoke cilock with argv starting "aws iam get-credential-report"
negativeSetup: Invoke cilock with unrelated argv (e.g. `echo unrelated`)
